security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: RGB keyboard control for Acer Predator
bundle.longDescription: Predator NoSense — a modern dark-themed desktop app to control the 4-zone RGB backlight of Acer Predator / Helios / Nitro keyboards on Linux, built on top of the acer-predator-turbo-and-rgb-keyboard kernel module by Jafar Akhondali.
